description: Abdullah Wahari, CEO of The Blockchain Center in Abu Dhabi, discusses the center's role in fostering innovation and investment in Web 3.0 technologies. He shares his journey into the crypto space, emphasizing the importance of education and community in driving acceptance and understanding of blockchain technology.
topic_summary: Abdullah Wahari outlines the significance of Abu Dhabi as a hub for blockchain innovation and investment, highlighting the center's initiatives to support Web 3.0 development and the need for increased knowledge and acceptance in the crypto community. He reflects on the evolution of the industry and the future of stablecoins and digital payments [t=354.32].
